subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who desireth to turn towards the Most Exalted Horizon, when the Lord of Names appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اراد ان یتوجه الی الافق الاعلی اذ ظهر مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
